chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP No.D-5564 of 2019 ___________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.24529/2019 2. For hearing of main case. 08.09.2021 None present for the Petitioner. Mr. Kafeel Ahmed Abbasi Deputy Attorney General Mr. Hussain Bohra, Assistant Attorney General. ********** On the last date of hearing petitioner’s counsel was called absent and we have been informed by Mr. Abbasi, learned Deputy Attorney General that this is a covered case by judgment of this court. Be that as it may, petitioner and his counsel is yet again called absent and there is no intimation either. Dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE Amjad/PA
